purpose: Initial clean training, validation, inference, and submission pipeline.
local_validation_status: held-out validation at the time of the run
outcome: Established the first end-to-end baseline and exposed hoverfly as the weakest class.

purpose: Longer barebones fine-tune to test whether additional training improved generalization.
local_validation_status: held-out validation at the time of the run
outcome: Best checkpoint occurred around epoch 25, showing that longer training alone was not solving the problem.

purpose: Rare-class oversampling plus 3,506 hoverfly-centered crop images.
outcome: Magnifying hoverflies did not improve hoverfly AP, supporting the conclusion that the issue was discrimination rather than scale alone.

training_data: official train + validation keyframes with generated tiles/crops
purpose: SAHI-style tiles, rare-class crops, and mined hard-negative clutter regions.
outcome: The run produced only 523 useful hard negatives rather than the 3,000 target, and sliced inference increased false positives.

purpose: Full-frame train+validation final fit with rare-class image oversampling.
outcome: One of the strongest YOLO-family submissions; the report records the YOLO range as approximately 0.368–0.369.

purpose: Model B fine-tuned on 700×700 slices with 20% overlap, initialized from the full-frame model.
local_validation_status: seen/leaked sliced validation produced during training
outcome: Used as the complementary sliced detector in the A+B ensemble.

purpose: Gated full-frame and sliced ensemble using the historically selected fusion configuration.
local_validation_status: No validation tuning in this notebook
outcome: Model A supplied all classes; Model B supplied bee, bumblebee, and moth, with hoverfly excluded.

purpose: Eight-epoch proof of concept at 1120 resolution with train+validation oversampling.
local_validation_status: leaked validation, best EMA during training
submission_status: Submission artifact created; hidden score not retained in notebook/report
outcome: Established enough upside to move from YOLO to a longer RF-DETR Large run.

purpose: First serious 32-epoch RF-DETR Large run at 1120 resolution.
local_validation_status: leaked validation, threshold sweep operating point
outcome: Outperformed the strongest YOLO configurations on the hidden test set.

purpose: Hard-routed detections by COCO object-size bands, followed by class-aware NMS.
outcome: Underperformed standalone RF-DETR because hard routing discarded useful detections and mixed uncalibrated scores.

purpose: Controlled resolution increase from 1120 to 1344 with the remaining setup frozen.
outcome: Best competition result: 0.405 mAP@0.5:0.95 and 10th place out of 36.

purpose: Six-frame causal tracklets using Hungarian association, score fusion, class fusion, and proposal recovery.
outcome: Temporal post-processing did not improve the single-frame baseline and admitted more low-confidence detections.

purpose: Fresh controlled 1536-resolution run from the pretrained initialization.
outcome: Likely the more promising 1536 experiment, but hidden-test performance could not be confirmed.

purpose: Adaptation from the selected 1344 EMA checkpoint to 1536 for 12 epochs at half learning rate.
outcome: The rising leaked score did not generalize; the hidden score fell below the 1344 model, indicating overfitting.

purpose: True resume of the warm-started 1536 run from 12 to 18 total epochs.
submission_status: Finished after the deadline; not submitted
outcome: Further increased the leaked metric, but no hidden-test evaluation was available.
